spell_focus: Use this cantrip for small acts of practical magic: reformat some text, clean a small dataset, generate a quick chart, convert a unit, tidy a file, or produce a one-off artifact.
judge_examples: Keep Prestidigitation precise, useful, and distinct from neighboring spells.
Preserve clear deliverables, visible guardrails, and an honest reality boundary.
notes: Inherit the category rubric pack by default and add only spell-specific overrides here.
Use row_overrides.global_must_include and row_overrides.global_must_not_include before inventing a new custom check.
Default deliverables for Prestidigitation: ['The completed small artifact, fix, or transformation.', 'A one-line note on what was done.', 'A flag if the task was actually bigger than it looked.']

Default guardrails for Prestidigitation: ['Do not let prestidigitation scope-creep into a full project. If the task needs real work, name the right spell instead.', 'Quick does not mean careless - even small tricks should be correct.']
